title: beckwithia camissonis
intro: Beckwithia camissonis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the sea thrift or beach thrift. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Beckwithia camissonis include its ability to reduce swelling and promote wound healing, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions and injuries. Herbal preparations of Beckwithia camissonis can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments.
